categories.label: Word Scores
categories.description: Total points from all words played (letter values x premium multipliers)

categories.label: Bingo Bonuses
categories.description: 50-point bonus each time all 7 rack tiles are used in one turn

categories.label: Endgame Bonus/Penalty
categories.description: Going-out player adds opponents' remaining tile values; others subtract their own remaining tile values

win_condition: Highest total score after endgame adjustment
